rows.label: qev041601_MSG0001
rows.name:
This is terrible, mo!
This is terrible, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0002
rows.name: Courier Kutta is in the biggest crisis of his life, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0003
rows.name: My precious cargo was stolen from me, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0004
rows.name: Moreover, the only characteristic I know about the culprit is that it was "some kind of huge thing," mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0005
rows.name:
With only that, I cannot even go to retrieve it, mo!
But since it is a "huge thing," even if I knew what it was, a retrieval operation would require serious consultation, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ah, this is a disaster, mo!
It is a crisis, mo! I am in trouble, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0007
rows.name:
...And that was the cry of Kutta's heart, mo.
Did you hear all of it, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Since you heard it, I want you to lend me a hand, mo!
It is unfair to eavesdrop and just say goodbye, mo!
It makes me sad, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_JNK0010
rows.name: Assist

rows.label: qev041601_SEL0011
rows.name: Help Kutta search for his cargo.

rows.label: qev041601_JNK0020
rows.name: Probe

rows.label: qev041601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask for more information on the situation.

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0009
rows.name: Really, mo!? You will lend me a hand, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0010
rows.name:
You are a good person, mo!
Courier Kutta is deeply moved, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0011
rows.name: Will you lend me a hand, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0012
rows.name: When the cargo was stolen, Kutta was taking a nap, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0013
rows.name: So I do not know any of the details, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0014
rows.name: The information about it being a "huge thing" came from asking my companions afterward, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0015
rows.name: Many of my companions actually saw the "huge thing" that committed the crime this time, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Kutta tried asking around too, mo.
But in the end, I did not really understand anything, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Basically, while Kutta loves to talk, I am not very good at listening, mo!
I need you to understand that, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0018
rows.name: Therefore, to get the cargo back, the best first step would be to try asking my companions yourself, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0019
rows.name:
You have the face of a good listener, mo!
Since Kutta, a good talker, says so, there is no mistake, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0020
rows.name: Well then, I leave it to you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0021
rows.name: Apparently, the "huge thing" was really, truly huge, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0022
rows.name: This is the only precious piece of information Kutta has, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0023
rows.name: Was it helpful, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0024
rows.name:
Have you gathered any information, mo?
Does it look like we will find the culprit who stole the cargo, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0025
rows.name: Courier Kutta is reaching the limit of how long he can just sit still here, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041601_MSG0026
rows.name:
I want my cargo back quickly, mo~
I want to get back to work quickly, mo~[ST:wait ]
